calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Taking Of Defendant Ariana Schlotthauers Deposition, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Advanced From Feb-02-15 To Jan-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment/Defendant did not appear.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Ike M. Kaludi, Jr., Esq., appearing for Plaintiff MICHELE L. MCGILL.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant ARIANA SCHLOTTHAUER.
Plaintiff Michele L. McGill sworn and examined on her own behalf.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Damages $15,965.28
Pre-Judgment Interest $1,522.14
Attorney's Fees $8,262.10
Costs $635.00
Other. Sanctions $3,000.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $29,384.52
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Taking Of Defendant Ariana Schlotthauers Deposition, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. IKE M. KALUDI, JR., Tel No. (510) 559-0320 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - At the hearing and per the Court's instructions, Plaintiff's counsel provided the Court a courtesy copy of the proof of service of the order advancing the hearing date. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MICHELE MCGILL'S Motion To Compel The Taking Of Defendant Ariana Schlotthauers Deposition, and For Sanctions is granted as unopposed. The Court ordered sanctions against Defendant Ariana Schlotthauer in the amount of $1,500.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. IKE M. KALUDI, JR., Tel No. (510) 559-0320 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - At the hearing and per the Court's instructions, Plaintiff's counsel provided the Court a courtesy copy of the proof of service of the order advancing the hearing date. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MICHELE MCGILL'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted as unopposed. The Court ordered sanctions against Defendant Ariana Schlotthauer in the amount of $1,500.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
